portfolio_rationale: LLY stands out with exceptional revenue growth (85% YoY), the strongest technical picture (price above all MAs, positive momentum on both timeframes), and a weak bear case, warranting the largest allocation. AMZN offers strong fundamentals and bullish news but neutral technicals, justifying a meaningful secondary position. AAPL and GOOGL receive smaller weights due to weaker technicals and higher uncertainty respectively. BRK.B and XOM are excluded: BRK.B has negative revenue growth and negative momentum on both timeframes, while XOM carries a bearish technical signal, multiple risk flags, and a thin fundamental case.

LLY.reason: Best-in-class revenue growth, strongest technical setup with price above all moving averages and positive momentum, bullish news sentiment, and the weakest bear opposition in the universe.

AMZN.reason: 26% revenue growth, strong margins, bullish news trends, and positive return momentum offset partially neutral technicals and minor liquidity concern.

AAPL.reason: Solid fundamentals with strong margins and cash flows, but RSI near oversold and price below 20-day MA limit conviction relative to LLY and AMZN.

GOOGL.reason: Strong ROE/ROA and cash flows with low debt, but missing key fundamental metrics, declining search trends, and a more credible bear case reduce conviction.

BRK.B.reason: Negative revenue growth YoY and negative return momentum on both 5-day and 20-day timeframes make the bull case insufficiently compelling relative to peers.

XOM.reason: Technical analyst explicitly bearish, negative momentum on both timeframes, crowded positioning risk, litigious news, and a thin fundamental case with only cash flow support.
